title: Extend safety auditor to data/exports and tighten evidence checks
problem: The safety auditor validates only apps/public-site/public/data/ export JSON. Live-mode scratch exports land in data/exports/ without the same deterministic audit coverage, leaving a gap as Phase 2 export targets grow.
acceptance_criteria: When data/exports/*.json exists, full safety audit validates those files with the same public export policy and forbidden-value patterns.
When data/exports/ is missing or has no JSON files, full audit still passes (no false failure).
GT23 covers clean scratch export pass and leaky export fail-closed behavior.
Golden tests and default pytest pass without Ollama.
non_goals: Do not change public export schema or committed public-site JSON.
Do not add cloud deployment automation.
Do not promote improvement tickets or edit TICKET_QUEUE beyond this ticket row.
rollback_plan: Revert the ticket-043 branch; safety auditor returns to public-site-only export scan.
